---
title: '544'
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#write.csv(brfss_ca, file = "C:\\Users\\jonah\\Downloads\\brfss_ca.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r CDC Data}
library(haven)
library(skimr)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
brfss_raw <- read_xpt("C:\\Users\\jonah\\Downloads\\LLCP2022XPT\\LLCP2022.XPT")
brfss_ca<-brfss_raw%>%filter(`_STATE`==6,`_METSTAT`==1)
brfss_ca%>%skim()

```
```{r}
library(PerformanceAnalytics)
filt=brfss_ca[,c("INCOME3","GENHLTH","_TOTINDA","MEDCOST1",
                 "PRIMINSR","CHECKUP1","_PHYS14D","_IMPRACE",
                 "MARITAL","EDUCA","EMPLOY1","CHILDREN","_HLTHPLN",
                 "PERSDOC3","_MENT14D")]
#chart.Correlation(filt, method='pearson')

```
```{r NAs}
na_summary(filt)
```
```{r}
library(factoextra)
filt_numeric <- filt[, sapply(filt, is.numeric)]
filt_clean <- na.omit(filt_numeric)
filt_clean <- filt_clean[is.finite(rowSums(filt_clean)), ]
filt_clean <- filt_clean[, apply(filt_clean, 2, var) != 0]

#fviz_nbclust(filt_clean, kmeans,method='wss')

#set.seed(54321)
#kmen<-kmeans(filt_clean, centers = 3, nstart=20)
```


```{r}
print(kmen)
fviz_cluster(kmen, data=filt_clean,geom_point='point', 
             ellipse.type = 'convex',ggtheme=theme_minimal())
```
```{r 3D cluster}
library(plotly)
pca_data <- prcomp(filt_clean, scale. = TRUE)
df_pca <- as.data.frame(pca_data$x[, 1:3])
df_pca$cluster <- as.factor(kmen$cluster)
```

```{r Cluster information}
table(kmen$cluster)
filt_clean$cluster <- kmen$cluster

clustered_data <- cbind(filt[rownames(filt_clean), ], cluster = kmen$cluster)
```

```{r 3D cluster graph}
plot_ly(df_pca, 
        x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, z = ~PC3, 
        color = ~cluster, 
        colors = "Set1",
        type = 'scatter3d', 
        mode = 'markers',
        marker = list(size = 5, opacity = 0.8)) %>%
  layout(title = "3D Cluster Visualization (k=5)",
         scene = list(xaxis = list(title = 'PC1'),
                      yaxis = list(title = 'PC2'),
                      zaxis = list(title = 'PC3')))
```

```{r NA Check function}
na_summary <- function(data, only_na = FALSE) {
  
  na_count <- colSums(is.na(data))
  na_percent <- colMeans(is.na(data)) * 100
  
  result <- data.frame(
    variable = names(na_count),
    na_count = na_count,
    na_percent = round(na_percent, 2)
  )
  
  if (only_na) {
    result <- result[result$na_count > 0, ]
  }
  
  return(result)
}
```


```{r}
filt_clean%>%ggplot(aes(x=factor(INCOME3), fill=factor(MEDCOST1)))+geom_bar(position="fill")
```
```{r}
filt_clean%>%ggplot(aes(x=factor(INCOME3), fill=factor(`_PHYS14D`)))+geom_bar(position="fill")
```

```{r}
filt_clean%>%ggplot(aes(x=factor(PRIMINSR), fill=factor(MEDCOST1)))+geom_bar(position="fill")
```
